name: Fletcher Building Limited
analysis: FBU's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 20% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.7200. Trade idea: entry A$2.7600, stop A$2.5146, target A$3.0600 (1.22:1) — then trail it.
